refnamediv.refpurpose: Sample image values along a line.

listitem.para: N-by-2 polyline points as [x y] image coordinates.
Sampled image-coordinate positions along the profile.
Sampled grayscale values or RGB rows along the profile.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Samples grayscale or RGB values between successive [x y] points using the upper-left image origin. Explicit points are required; the old interactive graphics implementation is archived under macros/old.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: Documented in the OpenCV 5 development line.
